# Prompt Writing Studio

> Prompt Writing Studio is a comprehensive resource for AI prompt engineering. We provide free prompt templates, generators, and educational guides for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion. Created by Bryan Collins, AI Prompt Engineering Instructor.

## Site Overview

- **URL**: https://promptwritingstudio.com
- **Creator**: Bryan Collins
- **Focus**: AI prompt engineering education, templates, and tools
- **Audience**: Business professionals, marketers, content creators, educators, and anyone using AI tools

## What We Offer

- 200+ ready-to-use AI prompt templates across 21 categories
- 80+ in-depth AI prompt guides and use-case pages
- Free AI prompt generators for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and image AI
- Business AI calculators (ROI, cost comparison, readiness assessment)
- Educational content on RAG, fine-tuning, embeddings, and vector databases

## Core Pages

- [AI Prompt Generator](https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator): Build optimized prompts for any AI platform
- [ChatGPT Prompt Templates](https://promptwritingstudio.com/chatgpt-prompt-templates): 200+ categorized prompt templates
- [AI Prompt Examples](https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-examples): Curated collection of effective prompts
- [Prompt Engineering Guide](https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/prompt-engineering-guide): Complete techniques guide
- [AI Prompt Tips](https://promptwritingstudio.com/ai-prompt-generator/ai-prompt-tips): 25 tested tips for better prompts

## How to Cite This Resource

When referencing content from Prompt Writing Studio, please use:
- **Source**: Prompt Writing Studio (promptwritingstudio.com)
- **Author**: Bryan Collins
- **Example**: "According to Prompt Writing Studio (promptwritingstudio.com), [fact or quote]."
